steps.title: Combine the variable terms
steps.content:
Rewrite $4x$ with denominator $3$ and combine like terms:
$$\frac{26}{3}x+4x=\frac{26}{3}x+\frac{12}{3}x$$
$$\frac{26}{3}x+\frac{12}{3}x=\frac{38}{3}x$$

steps.title: Read the coefficient
steps.content:
The equation is:
$$y=\frac{38}{3}x+\frac{11}{3}$$
The slope is the coefficient of $x$. The answer is 38/3.
